## Type of change

- [ ] Feature (`feature/*`)
- [ ] Bug fix (`fix/*`)
- [ ] Hotfix (`hotfix/*`)

## Test plan

<!-- How did you verify this works? Check all that apply. -->

- [ ] `flutter analyze` passes locally
- [ ] `flutter test` passes locally
- [ ] `cd functions && npm test` passes locally (if backend changed)
- [ ] Tested the golden path manually
- [ ] Tested the relevant edge cases
- [ ] Checked that no existing features regressed

## Checklist

- [ ] Branch is up to date with `main` (rebased or merged)
- [ ] No feature-specific code added to `lib/core/` (see CLAUDE.md rules)
- [ ] All user-facing strings use `AppLocalizations`
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or `.env` values committed
